use_cases: Creating tech-forward hero headlines with decryption-style animations on hover
Displaying interactive section titles in developer documentation
Adding engaging hover effects to navigation menu items
Building eye-catching call-to-action text in software landing pages
Enhancing brand headlines with a computational cryptography aesthetic
ai_summary: A React text component that displays words with a scrambling decryption animation triggered on hover. When users hover over text, characters rapidly cycle through random uppercase letters and symbols before resolving to the final word, creating a cyberpunk/hacker aesthetic. Uses Framer Motion for smooth animations and React hooks for state management. Ideal for tech-forward interfaces, developer tools, and SaaS landing pages wanting a computational visual effect.
